title: Pillar Security
description: Pillar provides holistic AI security platform through discovery and mapping of models, prompts, tools, agents, datasets, MCP servers, and third-party components, enabling effective and customized AI-SPM, Red Teaming, and Runtime Protection for agentic systems,

items: Conducting Agentic Threat Modeling, Support for Gen AI Security Project - Agentic Security Threat Modeling Approach
Available Agent Scanning, Agent Penetration Testing, Adversarial red-teaming: goal drift, prompt injection, hallucination chaining, & over-permissioned tool usage.
Multi-agent scenario simulations for collusion, misalignment, or deception detection.
Validate agent decisions against expected goal plans.
Sandboxed testing of all tool calls, code execution, cloud API triggers
